name: Golden Potato Surprise
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook potatoes until fork tender.
2. Melt margarine in a pan and cook onions. Sprinkle with flour, add salt and pepper. Slowly add cream, stirring constantly until thickened. Remove from heat and cool slightly.
3. Add mustard and mayo, stirring until well blended.
4. Arrange potatoes in a lightly greased casserole dish. Cover with the sauce.
5. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes.
6. Sprinkle with crumbled bacon and serve.
